name: Bruno Ramos Martins
role: Data Scientist · Machine Learning · GenAI & Fraud Prevention
summary: Data science and AI professional with hands-on experience in fraud prevention, statistical modeling, and data analysis. Mathematics background (USP) supports structured reasoning and turning complex business problems into scalable solutions. Actively working on GenAI and LLMs—including RAG systems, automation (e.g. n8n), and unstructured data analysis—combining analytical rigor with practical delivery.

experience.title: Fraud Prevention Analyst — LATAM
experience.description: Full-time · Hybrid · São Paulo, Brazil. Acquirer (POINT) initiatives to improve authorization quality and manage fraud and chargeback risk.
highlights: Design and execute initiatives on the acquirer (POINT) side to optimize transaction approval while reducing chargeback and fraud exposure
Provide risk guidance and analytical support to the commercial organization

experience.title: Mentor & Tester
experience.description: Remote. Mentor for the TensorFlow Professional Certificate, supporting learners on computer vision, advanced techniques, transfer learning, NLP, and time-series forecasting.
highlights: Mentor learners across TensorFlow specialization modules (CV, NLP, sequences, deployment-oriented patterns)
Early access tester for new DeepLearning.AI programs (e.g. agentic AI systems)

experience.title: Data Analyst — Statistical Modeling
experience.description: Full-time · São Paulo, Brazil. Surveillance and analytics for equities, futures, options, and fixed income.
highlights: Extracted, modeled, and analyzed trading and market data to detect unusual patterns and suspicious activity
Delivered analyses for client reviews, new product assessment, volatility studies, trading-pattern investigations, and penalty evaluation
Daily stack: Python, SQL, SAS, Excel, and statistical methods

experience.title: Master's Summer Program — Digital Product
highlights: Built indicators and insights for digital product decisions; data prep with Python and Alteryx
Created Tableau dashboards and reporting for stakeholders

experience.title: Mathematics Teacher

highlights: Nine years teaching algebra, geometry, and calculus with focus on problem-solving and exam readiness
